age_range.evidence: Each account was configured to represent a 13- or 15-year-old user, using corresponding birth dates at account creation

countries.evidence: Two researchers each operated two accounts, using separate devices and Irish IP addresses.

fieldwork_year.evidence: Four new dummy TikTok accounts were created in September 2024.

gender_split.evidence: with one male and one female profile in each age group.

sample_size.evidence: Across the four accounts, 3,023 videos appeared in the “For You” feed
